memoryArtifacts.headline: Alan FitzRoland, Lord of Galloway (1185-1234) buried at Dundrennan Abbey, Dundrennan, Dumfries and Galloway, Scotland
memoryArtifacts.description:
Alan FitzRoland, Lord of Galloway
Birth: 	1185
Wigtown
Dumfries and Galloway, Scotland
Death: 	Feb., 1234, Scotland

Alan FitzRoland, Lord of Galloway and Constable of Scotland. He was a "leading thirteenth-century Scottish magnate. As the hereditary Lord of Galloway and Constable of Scotland, he was one of the most influential men in the Kingdom of Scotland and Irish Sea zone." [Wikipedia]

Eldest son of Roland FitzUhtred, Lord of Galloway and Helen de Morville. Grandson of Uhtred and great grandson of Fergus, the King of Galloway, who was married to a daughter of King Henry I of England. He was the grandfather of King John Balliol of Scotland.

Alan married a de Lacy, thought to be a daughter of Roger de Lacy, Constable of Chester. They had several children including boys who died young:
* Daughter, died as Scottish hostage 1213
* Helen, wife of Roger de Quincy

Alan's second wife was Margaret de Huntingdon, the daughter of David of Scotland, 8th Earl of Huntingdon by his wife, Matilda of Chester, daughter of Hugh de Kevelioc, 3rd Earl of Chester. His children with Margaret were:
* Christina, wife of William de Forz
* Dervorguilla of Galloway, wife of John Balliol, 5th Baron de Balliol
* Thomas, died young

A third wife, no issue, was Rose de Lacy. He also had an illegitimate son named Thomas. 

Alan was the most powerful and influential man in Scotland, known for his military strength and army size, his extensive holdings in Scotland, Ireland and England, affected the decisions of Scottish kings and was one of John Lackland's advisors concerning the Magna Carta. He was the last legitimate ruler of Galloway, and his family was remarkable for their religious contributions. His great grandfather founded Dundrennan Abbey where he was buried, and Alan founded Tongland Abbey. Alan accompanied Robert de Brus and Walter FitzAlan on a pilgrimage to Canterbury to witness the placing of the remains of Saint Thomas. 

Alan's life was incredibly full, complicated and a combination of Gaelic, Frankish, Scottish and English events. No simple bio could possibly describe it all. 

After his death, the position of Constable went to his son in law, Roger de Quincy. His only surviving son, the illegitimate Thomas, might have ruled Galloway had the Scottish crown not disallowed it by seizing the lordship and splitting the lands between his daughters, sans the Irish holdings which were given to the Bissets at an unknown point. 
 
Family links: 
 Parents:
  Roland de Galloway (1164 - 1200)
  Elena de Morville Galloway (____ - 1217)
 
 Children:
  Elena McDonald Of Galloway (1208 - 1245)*
  Devorguilla de Galloway (1218 - 1290)*
 
*Calculated relationship
 
Burial:
Dundrennan Abbey 
Dundrennan
Dumfries and Galloway, Scotland

zh.lifeSummary: 當Alan FitzRoland Lord of Galloway於1186年出生在英國蘇格蘭吉德布萊次爾時，他的父親Roland MacUchtred of Galloway23歲，母親Elena de Morville21歲。他於1200年之前與Unknown de Lacy結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他在蘇格蘭被列為inherited the position of constable of scotland and massive holdings in scotland, becoming the most powerful magnate in scotland。他去世於1234年4月在英國蘇格蘭度福利爾吉德布萊特享年48歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭吉德布萊次爾吉德布萊特。

nameMeanings.name: Alan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

en.lifeSummary: When Alan FitzRoland Lord of Galloway was born in 1186, in Kirkcudbrightshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Roland MacUchtred of Galloway, was 23 and his mother, Elena de Morville, was 21. He married Unknown de Lacy before 1200. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. His occupation is listed as inherited the position of constable of scotland and massive holdings in scotland, becoming the most powerful magnate in scotland in Scotland. He died in April 1234, in Kirkcudbright, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 48, and was buried in Kirkcudbright, Kirkcudbrightshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alan FitzRoland Lord of Galloway est né en 1186, à Kirkcudbrightshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Roland MacUchtred of Galloway, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Elena de Morville, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Unknown de Lacy avant 1200. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Sa profession de son indiquée est inherited the position of constable of scotland and massive holdings in scotland, becoming the most powerful magnate in scotland à Écosse. Il est décédé en avril 1234, à Kirkcudbright, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterré à Kirkcudbright, Kirkcudbrightshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alan FitzRoland Lord of Galloway 1186 in Kirkcudbrightshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roland MacUchtred of Galloway 23 und seine Mutter Elena de Morville 21. Er hat vor 1200 Unknown de Lacy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. sein Beruf ist als inherited the position of constable of scotland and massive holdings in scotland, becoming the most powerful magnate in scotland in Scotland aufgeführt. Er starb im April 1234 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Kirkcudbright, Dumfriesshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Kirkcudbright, Kirkcudbrightshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alan FitzRoland Lord of Galloway è nato il nel 1186 nel Kirkcudbrightshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Roland MacUchtred of Galloway, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Elena de Morville, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Unknown de Lacy prima del 1200. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. La sua occupazione è indicata come inherited the position of constable of scotland and massive holdings in scotland, becoming the most powerful magnate in scotland nel Scotland. Morì nel aprile 1234, nel Kirkcudbright, Dumfriesshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolto a Kirkcudbright, Kirkcudbrightshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Alan FitzRoland Lord of Gallowayが1186年にイギリススコットランドキルククウドブリトシュアイアで生まれた時，父Roland MacUchtred of Gallowayは23歳，母Elena de Morvilleは21歳であった。1200年以前にUnknown de Lacyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。スコットランドでの職業はinherited the position of constable of scotland and massive holdings in scotland, becoming the most powerful magnate in scotlandと記録されている。彼は1234年4月にイギリススコットランドダムフリーシュアイアキルククウドブリトで48歳で死去し，スコットランドキルククウドブリトシュアイアキルククウドブリトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alan FitzRoland Lord of Galloway(이)가 1186년 영국 스코틀랜드 커kc드브라이츠히르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roland MacUchtred of Galloway(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Elena de Morville(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1200년 이전 Unknown de Lacy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 스컷랜드에서 inherited the position of constable of scotland and massive holdings in scotland, becoming the most powerful magnate in scotland이었다. 그는 1234년 4월 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리실르 커kc드브라이트에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 커kc드브라이츠히르 커kc드브라이트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alan FitzRoland Lord of Galloway nasceu em 1186, em Kirkcudbrightshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Roland MacUchtred of Galloway, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Elena de Morville, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Unknown de Lacy antes 1200. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Sua profissão aparece como inherited the position of constable of scotland and massive holdings in scotland, becoming the most powerful magnate in scotland em Scotland. Ele faleceu em abril de 1234, em Kirkcudbright, Dumfriesshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 48 anos, e foi sepultado em Kirkcudbright, Kirkcudbrightshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alan FitzRoland Lord of Galloway родился в 1186 г. в местности кирккудбраицхир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Roland MacUchtred of Galloway было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Elena de Morville, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Unknown de Lacy перед 1200 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь.  Он работал по профессии inherited the position of constable of scotland and massive holdings in scotland, becoming the most powerful magnate in scotland в местности Шотландия. Он умер апрель 1234 г. в местности кирккудбраит, думфриессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 48 лет и был похоронен в местности кирккудбраит, кирккудбраицхир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alan FitzRoland Lord of Galloway nació en 1186, en Kirkcudbrightshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Roland MacUchtred of Galloway, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Elena de Morville, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Unknown de Lacy antes de 1200. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Su ocupación registrada era inherited the position of constable of scotland and massive holdings in scotland, becoming the most powerful magnate in scotland en Scotland. Murió en abril de 1234, en Kirkcudbright, Dumfriesshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultado en Kirkcudbright, Kirkcudbrightshire, Scotland.
